examples: Because the latitudinal position of an island also affected its biotic mix, islands in cooler latitudes did not support some tropical species typical of the Pacific islands.
Elevational and latitudinal trends were not pronounced.
The latitudinal variation of the potential is steeper, and the maximum potential appears earlier.
The currents are what keep Europe's weather from taking after that of Canada, its latitudinal partner across the ocean.
There may also be a latitudinal limit to the technology.
